_comment: Per-repo file exclusions for the corpus oracle. Files listed here are excluded from RuboCop inspection via AllCops/Exclude overlay. With rescue_parser_crashes.rb loaded, crashes no longer kill subsequent files, but these exclusions still prevent known-crashy files from producing misleading 0-offense entries. Paths are relative to the repo root (glob syntax, same as AllCops/Exclude).

jruby__jruby__0303464.comment: Lint/LiteralAsCondition crash on bench_compilation.rb; Prism::Translation::Parser crashes on invalid multibyte regex escapes in test files, killing ~1000 files as collateral

ruby__logger__00796ec.comment: Invalid multibyte escape /[\x0-\xff]/ in test_logger.rb crashes RuboCop parser, causing 656 phantom FN across 62 cops in sibling test files. Exclude entire test dir.

cjstewart88__Tubalr__f6956c8.comment: Vendored Heroku buildpack gems — not project code, RuboCop excludes via AllCops.Exclude but corpus base_dir mismatch prevents resolution. Contributes ~20k phantom FP/FN across 400+ cops.

liaoziyang__stackneveroverflow__8f4dce2.comment: Vendored bundle gems — not project code, RuboCop excludes via AllCops.Exclude but corpus base_dir mismatch prevents resolution. Contributes ~15k phantom FP/FN.

infochimps-labs__wukong__437eff1.comment: Abandoned old/ directory with stale code — not part of active project. Parser crash in asciize.rb plus phantom FP/FN from old code paths.

pitluga__supply_drop__d64c50c.comment: Vendored puppet distribution — not project code, RuboCop excludes via AllCops.Exclude but corpus base_dir mismatch prevents resolution.

databasically__lowdown__d593927.comment: Vendored Rails checkout — not project code, RuboCop excludes via AllCops.Exclude but corpus base_dir mismatch prevents resolution.

noosfero__noosfero__299a0b9.comment: Vendored root libraries/tests under vendor/ began surfacing as clone-only Metrics/ClassLength FP noise. Exclude the affected vendored subtrees in corpus reruns via absolute-path overlay.
